shortDesc_en: Naturally grippy, lightly cushioned, and made to last for years.
shortDesc_el: Naturally grippy, lightly cushioned, and made to last for years.
longDesc_en: A naturally grippy cork mat over a cushioned base. It grips better the warmer you get, and it is built to outlast years of practice.
longDesc_el: A naturally grippy cork mat over a cushioned base. It grips better the warmer you get, and it is built to outlast years of practice.

shortDesc_en: Two firm, friendly blocks to bring the floor a little closer.
shortDesc_el: Two firm, friendly blocks to bring the floor a little closer.
longDesc_en: Two firm cork blocks. They bring the floor closer, steady a balance, and make every shape that bit more available to you.
longDesc_el: Two firm cork blocks. They bring the floor closer, steady a balance, and make every shape that bit more available to you.

shortDesc_en: A simple woven strap to sling your mat over a shoulder and go.
shortDesc_el: A simple woven strap to sling your mat over a shoulder and go.
longDesc_en: A simple woven cotton strap that loops around a rolled mat, so you can sling it over a shoulder and walk straight out the door.
longDesc_el: A simple woven cotton strap that loops around a rolled mat, so you can sling it over a shoulder and walk straight out the door.

shortDesc_en: A gently weighted, lavender-scented pillow for the deepest rest.
shortDesc_el: A gently weighted, lavender-scented pillow for the deepest rest.
longDesc_en: A gently weighted linen pillow, lightly scented with lavender. Rest it over the eyes in your final relaxation and the room disappears.
longDesc_el: A gently weighted linen pillow, lightly scented with lavender. Rest it over the eyes in your final relaxation and the room disappears.

shortDesc_en: Roomy organic cotton, printed in-house. Holds a mat and more.
shortDesc_el: Roomy organic cotton, printed in-house. Holds a mat and more.
longDesc_en: A roomy organic cotton tote, screen-printed in-house. It holds a mat, a flask, a towel and whatever else the day asks for.
longDesc_el: A roomy organic cotton tote, screen-printed in-house. It holds a mat, a flask, a towel and whatever else the day asks for.

shortDesc_en: The kindest little nudge. Redeemable on any class or pack.
shortDesc_el: The kindest little nudge. Redeemable on any class or pack.
longDesc_en: A Marigold gift card, redeemable on any class, class pack or membership. The kindest nudge for someone who keeps meaning to start.
longDesc_el: A Marigold gift card, redeemable on any class, class pack or membership. The kindest nudge for someone who keeps meaning to start.
